_session_note: salsa 0.26 prototype validated. Fitness graph architecture confirmed. biome.rs monolithic resolution deprecated. Constants still need retesting — blocked until ecosystem_core migration complete.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.status: active — architecture overhaul in progress. salsa_proto validated. ecosystem_core migration next.
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: DEPRECATED — monolithic fitness resolution being replaced by ecosystem_core. Still used in game until migration complete.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

ecosystem_core.role: Standalone crate owning all fitness computation via salsa 0.26. Game and sim_test both depend on it. Bevy-compatible as a data source if adopted later.
ecosystem_core.pattern: OrganismInputs and BiomeInputs as salsa input structs. Trait modifiers are leaf fields with defaults. Fitness queries are tracked functions. Adding a trait = setting a leaf field. No formula changes required.
ecosystem_core.db_pattern: Db trait (#[salsa::db]) + EcosystemDb concrete struct. All query functions take &dyn Db.

checks.drought_resistance: Producer fitness unchanged after herbivore water_multiplier 1.0→1.5. Subgraph isolation confirmed.
checks.high_output: food_pool scaled exactly 1.4x after producer food_output_multiplier 1.0→1.4.
checks.carnivore_addition: predation_factor dropped to 0.65, herbivore fitness dropped from 1.39 to 0.98. Aggregate fan-out correct.
checks.no_panics: Vec<OrganismInputs> as salsa input field works in 0.26.

api_notes.db_trait: #[salsa::db] on both trait and impl. Concrete db takes salsa::Storage<Self>.
api_notes.tracked_functions: First arg must be &dyn Db not &ConcreteDb.
api_notes.setter: use salsa::Setter required to call .to() on setters.
api_notes.update_derive: salsa::Update required on types stored in input fields. Role enum needs this.

sim_harness.location: sim_test/ — standalone Rust binary, runs on Termux
sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile

food_pool_options.A: current pop, no fitness scaling — cliff-edge collapse
food_pool_options.C: last-turn fitness scaling — gradual signal, tighter feedback

sim_harness.note: biomeS.rs is sim version of biome.rs. Will be replaced by ecosystem_core queries once migration complete. Do not retune constants until then.

share_formula_overhaul.change: All resource shares are now population-based, not need-based
share_formula_overhaul.water: water_share = (org_pop / total_animal_pop) * water — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.herbivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_herb_omni_pop) * food_pool — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.carnivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_carn_pop) * prey_value — equal share per individual
share_formula_overhaul.rationale: Need-weighted shares let high water_need organisms claim more water, masking food deficits with water surplus. Now each individual gets equal access to resources, need determines if that access is sufficient.
share_formula_overhaul.impact: ALL K values, nutrition factors, and food_need values need retesting. Blocked until ecosystem_core migration complete.

components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0

fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED → returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5

thresholds.note: No stable zone — upgrade_if_best == downgrade_if_worst. Dynamic oscillation only.

fitness_system.food_pool_timing: Uses last_population (Option B) — one-turn delay. Snapshot at start of resolve().

resources.sunlight: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0). Shading: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K per size group.
resources.minerals: resource_factor(share, mineral_need). share = (reach / total_reach) * minerals. Per-individual, pop cancels.
resources.food_herbivore: Pop-based share of food_pool. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).
resources.food_carnivore: Pop-based share of prey_value. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).

pressure_system.trampling: sum(max(0, herb_size - prod_size) * herb_territory * herb_pop) * PRESSURE_K2. Per-producer, scales with absolute herbivore numbers.
pressure_system.sparsity: COMMENTED OUT — kept for potential camouflage trait use later. K=9, 20% max penalty on food_need symmetrically.

predation_system.hunt_limit: carnivore.size * hunt_multiplier + hunt_size_bonus — additive bonus, fixed this session in salsa_proto
predation_system.predation_factor: 1 / (1 + carn_food_need / prey_share * PREDATION_K). Applied to herbivore fitness.
predation_system.hunt_size_bonus: Now additive in salsa_proto. Apply same fix to biomeS.rs and game biome.rs.

omnivore.note: NOT YET SIMULATED after share fix

carnivore.note: Last tested: water_need=1.4 food_need=0.7 — herbivore still extinct. Retest after ecosystem_core.

card_ideas_noted.camouflage_trait: PredationResistance scaling with population density — uses sparsity-style mechanic
card_ideas_noted.carnivorous_plant: Producer role with predation-like mechanic — gains fitness from small animal presence, applies pressure to small herbivores. Needs new TraitEffect or hybrid role.
card_ideas_noted.hunt_size_bonus: Fixed to additive in salsa_proto. Apply to biomeS.rs and game biome.rs.

confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.note: Confirmed before share formula change. Directionally correct but values will differ.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.P1_H1: Boom-bust. Grows to P4 H4, collapses turn 5 without carnivore.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.carnivore_window: Safe entry H2-H4. Too early kills herbivore, too late collapse inevitable.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.collapse_threshold: P4 H6 extinction, P5 H6 survives.
confirmed_dynamics_pre_share_fix.design_goal: No stable P+H — collapse is default. Carnivore or omnivore required for stability.

2026-05-26.decision: Adopt salsa 0.26 as incremental computation backend for ecosystem_core
2026-05-26.rationale: Validated prototype confirms dirty-flagging isolates per-organism subgraphs; trait modifiers as input leaves require no formula changes

implementation.attempted: salsa_proto — producer + herbivore + carnivore fitness graph with trait modifier leaves
implementation.outcome: All four validation checks passed. food_pool fan-out correct. Aggregate queries dirty on organism list change. Trait modifier as leaf field confirmed. hunt_size_bonus changed to additive.
implementation.decided: Migrate fitness resolution into ecosystem_core crate using salsa 0.26. OrganismInputs as salsa input struct with trait modifier leaves. Retune constants only after migration complete. Current biome.rs monolithic resolution deprecated.

next_session_tasks: Create ecosystem_core crate — salsa input structs migrated from types.rs
Migrate fitness queries from biome.rs into ecosystem_core matching salsa_proto shape
Retune constants against new system — first valid baseline
Replace sim_test biomeS.rs with ecosystem_core queries
Game build on top of ecosystem_core
Update game.rs/ai.rs/ui.rs to v4 types (blocked until core stable)
